0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h1","children":"Vector Search"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Dense embedding-based similarity search using ",["$","code",null,{"children":"sqlite-vec"}]," for efficient nearest-neighbor queries on episodic memory."]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"How It Works"}],"\n",["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Embed"}],": Query text is converted to a 384-dimension vector via BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5 (loaded through ",["$","code",null,{"children":"fastembed"}],")"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Search"}],": ",["$","code",null,{"children":"sqlite-vec"}]," performs nearest neighbor search on ",["$","code",null,{"children":"int8"}]," quantized vectors stored in the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"vec_episodes"}]," table"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Score"}],": Cosine similarity between query and stored vectors"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Rank"}],": Results ordered by similarity (highest first)"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Embedding Model"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Mnemosyne uses ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5"}]," exclusively, loaded via the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"fastembed"}]," library:"]}],"\n",["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Property"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Value"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Model"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5"}]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Dimensions"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"384"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Quantization"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["int8 (configurable via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_VEC_TYPE"}],")"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Runtime"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Local only (no API calls)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Library"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"fastembed"}]}]]}]]}]]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"The model runs entirely locally — no OpenAI API key or network calls are required for embedding generation."}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Vector Storage"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Vectors are stored in a ",["$","code",null,{"children":"sqlite-vec"}]," virtual table:"]}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"-- Internal sqlite-vec table (created automatically)\nCREATE VIRTUAL TABLE vec_episodes USING vec0(\n  embedding int8[384]\n);\n","language":"sql"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Usage via recall()"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Vector search is performed automatically as part of the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"recall()"}]," method. There is no separate ",["$","code",null,{"children":"vector_search()"}]," API:"]}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\n\nmem = Mnemosyne()\n\n# recall() internally performs vector + FTS5 hybrid search\nresults = mem.recall(\"deployment strategy\", top_k=5)\n\nfor r in results:\n  print(f\"Score: {r['score']:.3f} — {r['content'][:80]}\")\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Performance Characteristics"}],"\n",["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Dataset Size"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Query Time"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Index Size"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"1K entries"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"15ms"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"6MB"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"10K entries"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"35ms"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"60MB"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"100K entries"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"85ms"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"600MB"}]]}]]}]]}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-info","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L4",null,{"iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 16v-4","key":"1dtifu"}],["path",{"d":"M12 8h.01","key":"e9boi3"}]],"className":"lucide-info shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"No External Dependencies"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":["Embeddings are generated locally via ","$L5",".
